case_title: JOHN LIM VS. RICHARD SERGIO ROLLIER

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1710 OAKDALE AVENUE #A RM 104, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, **RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JOHN SERVED APR-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE **$28.00** FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JOHN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLIER, RICHARD SERGIO
